description: Demonstrates counterpoint and polyphonic score-level transforms: Pedal Tone and Stretto.

score_transforms.comment: 1. Add Pedal Tone: Adds a deep C (130.81 Hz) that sustains for the full duration of the score.
score_transforms.name: add_pedal_tone

score_transforms.comment: 2. Stretto: Overlaps the 'subject' motif with itself 3 times using the Golden Ratio for entry spacing.
score_transforms.name: stretto
